subject: Automation adds so-offeredapis.rst
commit_message:
Automation adds so-offeredapis.rst

Issue-ID: CIMAN-376

Change-Id: I54657290919ab4f4e6070b91a54e39d97f390ff3
Signed-off-by: lf-jobbuilder <releng+lf-jobbuilder@linuxfoundation.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.
